Bug / Task Description: RGA.InsertAfter in pkg/crdt/rga.go must splice a new value immediately AFTER the element identified by afterID. Currently the element lands at the wrong slot relative to the target, so a value inserted 'after a' ends up before a; total length stays correct, hiding the defect, but the sequence order is wrong. Preserve correct ordering for both mid-sequence inserts and the insert-at-beginning case.
Commit Subject: fix(crdt): RGA InsertAfter positions element after target
